title: CSIR NEERI Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Project Scientist I Posts
description: The CSIR - National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Scientist I Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.E./M. Tech and Ph.D. holders can apply for the CSIR NEERI Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education det...
